# README.md snapshot

Source URL: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/can1357/oh-my-pi/main/README.md

Key requirements captured for this build:

- OMP is a coding agent with interactive, one-shot, RPC, and ACP entry points.
- The same OMP binary runs on macOS, Linux, and Windows without a WSL bridge.
- OMP has a TUI, tools, model roles, session/memory surfaces, and internal URL schemes including `skill://` and `rule://`.
- OMP supports roles such as default, smol, slow, plan, and commit through model routing.
- OMP exposes built-in tools for reading, writing, search, bash, eval, LSP, task, ask, memory, and web/search surfaces.
